title: Doppelganger applies attack dice plus two

card.rawText: Atk Dice Rolls: +2. Hit Dice Rolls: +2.

plan.title: Doppelganger applies attack dice plus two
plan.summary: Equip Doppelganger and verify the printed attack dice bonus.

notes: Use test_primary_creature_mod_0 so the dice bonus comes only from Doppelganger.

steps: Player 1 plays Doppelganger and equips it to their primary creature.
Read equipped creature effective attack dice.
manualVerification: Confirm the extra Hit Dice Rolls are shown in battle UI.
riskNotes: Hit Dice Rolls are not directly exposed by the current effective stat helper.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
